name: GOLFTEC Bentonville
about: GOLFTEC Bentonville is a golf training and club fitting center that utilizes advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, to provide data-driven coaching and club fitting services. The center focuses on personalized improvement plans, including golf lessons, on-course play evaluations, and practice memberships, all designed to help players of all levels achieve their golf goals through structured coaching and technology-enhanced feedback. GOLFTEC also operates a pro shop offering equipment and apparel at a 10% discount, and provides club fitting services with certified fitters who use data to optimize club performance for each golfer.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced motion capture technology
Professional coaching with personalized game plans for improvement
Comprehensive club fitting services that add an average of 21 yards

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors are used for lessons and fittings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, but you can also bring your own clubs. For club fittings, the center will provide various options for you to try.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC does not mention on-site food or drink services. There is no information indicating whether outside food or beverages are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Indoor sessions are not typically measured by a full 18 holes of golf. The focus is on skill improvement through lessons and practice, with on-course play evaluations being part of the coaching process.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC Bentonville caters to juniors and youth with specialized coaching programs and technology designed to help younger golfers understand and improve their game.
